scripts.build: bun run --filter './packages/*' build && bun run --filter './services/*' build
scripts.build:all: bun run build && bun run --filter flareo-web build
scripts.deploy: bun run --filter flareo-web build && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.db:migrate:local: bunx wrangler d1 execute flareo-app --local --file=./drizzle/0000_init.sql && bunx wrangler d1 execute flareo-app --local --file=./drizzle/0001_drop_triggers.sql && bunx wrangler d1 execute flareo-app --local --file=./drizzle/0001_add_compiled.sql
